title: Claim
description: A single sourced, contestable assertion. The shared spine of the KB: plant identification candidates, place coordinates, biographical facts, etc. are all claims. See docs/entities-knowledge-base.md §5. Extra keys are permitted so specialized claims may carry more (e.g. `ids` on a plant candidate, `provenance` on a medicinal use).

value.description: The asserted value — scalar or object. Intentionally unconstrained.

source.description: Key into data/sources.yaml. Required — no source, no claim.

asserted_by.description: Scholar or authority behind the claim, e.g. Feliks, Löw.

date.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) the claim was recorded.
